title: Webhook URL not recognized by n8n
symptom: n8n does not recognize the provided WEBHOOK_URL and defaults to using a n8n.cloud URL, causing webhook failures.
applies_when: Setting WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_HOST environment variables
not_this_if: n8n is not using the --tunnel option in the docker run command
root_cause: The presence of the --tunnel option in the docker run command causes n8n to ignore the provided WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_HOST variables, defaulting to its own cloud URL instead.
fix_steps: Remove the --tunnel option from the docker run command.
Ensure that the WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_HOST environment variables are correctly set in the docker run command.
Restart the n8n container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Remove the --tunnel option from the docker run command and restart the container.
